summary: DS18B20 digital temperature sensor with one-wire interface. Measures -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy (in -10~+85°C range).
notes: Requires 4.7kΩ external pull-up resistor on DQ line.
Parasitic power mode not recommended; use VDD supply.
One-wire timing is critical; disable interrupts during bit-level I/O.

app_logic_snippets.notes: Call StartConversion() then wait 750ms before ReadTemperature(). Returns -999.0f on read error. For multiple sensors on one bus, use ReadROM() to get 64-bit address.
